"- Within 1-3 working days (excluding Saturdays, Sundays, and public holidays as regulated), TPA will acknowledge receipt of your document. - Within 5 working days from receiving the document, TPA will inform you if any additional documents or verification are needed to support the determination of insurance coverage before proceeding. - After receiving all required documents from the insured person, within 5-15 working days (for employee claims), and 5-10 working days (for dependant claims), TPA will send a reimbursement notice to the insured person."

Free Voucher: You will receive a free voucher weekly for hair washing appointments (not applicable to other services at the hair salon).

Cancellation Policy: To avoid losing your voucher, please cancel your appointment at least 30 minutes before the scheduled time. This allows us to reschedule efficiently and ensure comfort for all customers.

Transfer booking: In case you cannot cancel within the specified time, you can still transfer your booking to someone else. However, if there is no replacement, your free voucher will be forfeited. Please take note!

FPT unites to bring hope and support to struggling children, offers rapid assistance to colleagues facing hardship, and expands nationwide charitable efforts. This is achieved through a meaningful action: one day’s salary contribution, fundraising for \"the FPT For the Community Fund\" in 2025.

Spread millions of smiles with
kindness
to the FPT for the Community Fund
"Your contribution will give wings to dreams!"
Your contribution will help many difficult circumstances and give wings to many dreams!
Have you confirmed the donation off
"After April 9, 2025, if you have not submitted, HRPR will understand that you agree to donate 01 day's salary and will automatically update it."
Employees who donate 02 or more compensatory leave days will receive 01 additional day of paid leave (valid for use in 2025).
The donation amount is calculated as: (number of contributed compensatory leave days) * (ABCD Salary / 22) - Personal Income Tax
Personal Income Tax is calculated based on a progressive tax rate for the respective contributed compensatory leave days.
Employees who donate 02 or more salary days will receive 01 additional day of paid leave (valid for use in 2025).
The donation amount is calculated as: (number of contributed salary days) * (ABCD Salary - Mandatory Insurance - Personal Income Tax) / 30

"Your meaningful action once again affirms the compassionate values that FPT people uphold. For the past 15 years, the FPT for the Community Fund has spread kindness, shared with those less fortunate, provided timely support to FPT employees in urgent need, and implemented meaningful charitable programs across the country. Thank you for joining hands to light up countless smiles and make millions of dreams come true."

"FPT Green Card: Employees are applied to one of the following cases:
1. Having full vaccination according to the regulations of the Ministry of Health applied to each vaccine and more than 14 days have passed since the second vaccination shot
2. Having recovered from the Covid-19 and meeting the following conditions: - 21 days have passed since the time of recovery. - Covid-19 Recovery Certificate issued by organizations or individuals according to regulations of state agencies.
3. Having 1 vacccination shot (requiring more than 2 injections according to the regulations of the Ministry of Health) and have a negative Covid-19 test results expired within 72 hours by PCR method."
FPT Red Card: cases not subject to green card or yellow card specified at point a, point b of this clause.

"FPT yellow card: Employees are applied to one of the following cases:
1. Having been vaccinated but not having the full doses of vaccineaccording to the regulations of the Ministry of Health and 14 days have passed since the first vaccination shot
2. Have not been vaccinated but got a negative Covid-19 test result within 72 hours"
